evidence: "A great classic Cary Grant movie with Tony Curtis in a hilarious WW2 movie about a submarine Captain and a hustler for a supply officer."
"A classic Cary Grant not playing his normal suave clean cut persona he usually plays."
"Great movie, classic. They don't make them like this anymore."
"A good family movie and very funny."
"The movie rocked. The soundtrack was awesome."
"A great story and visuals that didn't take away from the story but contributed to the story."
"I bought the DVD when I was watching a performance of Cirque in DC."
"I have it on DVD, and BluRay as well so you can tell I am a fan."
"It's a Old classic but a great demonstration of Danny Kaye's range as an actor."
"A classic Cary Grant not playing his normal suave clean cut persona he usually plays."
"Great story and visuals that didn't take away from the story but contributed to the story."
"A great glimpse back in the day."
"A must see for the whole family."

additional_patterns.name: nostalgia_preference

summary: The user has a strong preference for classic comedies and dramas, particularly those featuring Cary Grant and Danny Kaye. They enjoy fast-paced narratives with a focus on family-friendly themes and emotional resonance, often reflecting a sense of nostalgia for older films.
